cast.name: 塞巴斯汀·杰森 Sebastian Jessen
拉斯·米克尔森 Lars Mikkelsen

introduction: is set in Sweden as the country faces primitive power outages and ominous predictions about the coming winter. More particularly, the plot zooms in on reluctant widower Arthur (Erik “Jerka” Johansson). He gets recruited to help his colleague, star journalist Cristina (Nina Zanjani), who dares to question the mainstream narrative. Feeling cornered by the police and other powers, Arthur becomes her partner-in-crime, during the craziest, most hazardous day of his life. The only problem is that he has a date with Mille (Hanna Alström) and so as not to arouse any suspicion, it needs to happen as planned.
